name: Student Tutoring
description:
Warning: Extreme objectification/hypnosis/noncon

After failing one too many students due to your strict personality your newest batch of students decides to get revenge on you...

Idea provided via suggestion form by Anonymous

Tokyo University:

- You work as a professor at Tokyo University where you've made a reputation for yourself as a strict no-nonsense teacher who fails students left and right. After failing yet another set of students after a test finally something snaps and a plot is formed. One of your students found a strange hypnotic video on the dark web which they intend to email to you before your tutoring session with a group of your students.

The Hypnosis:

- One of your students found a strange hypnotic video which using a swirling spiral pattern puts anybody that watches it into a trance. While in that trance the video will play a recorded message for the victim which will seep into their very being transforming even the most pious of priests into happy slutty bimbos who love sex and submission.

Join my discord! We even have the demon Baphomet to give you life advice.

Discord

Want me to make something specific? Make a suggestion on my form!
